payload.compiled_summary:
ParaView: use ParaView CLI, ParaView case/setup artifact, eng_paraview_docker. Adapter python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker takes working_dir, problem. Launcher knowledge/coding-tools/runtime/launchers/eng_paraview-container.sh. Recipe ParaView phase 2 runtime-linked recipe follows Resolve artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker as the canonical runtime surface, Run the linked health check for ParaView, Stop if the runtime verification report is still REWORK, Execute ParaView only inside its declared capability boundary and record the evidence refs. Runtime eng-paraview/docker_image at birtha/knowledge-eng-paraview:1.0.0; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker; verification refs artifact://verification-report/2217364c-bd8c-53be-b282-1be083e9ef04. Runtime gate: Healthcheck failed for artifact://environment-spec/eng_paraview_docker: docker: Error response from daemon: failed to create task for container: failed to create shim task: OCI runtime create failed: runc create failed: unable to start container process: error during container init: exec: "python": executable file not found in $PATH.
VTK: use vtk, VTK model object, eng_backbone_uv. Adapter python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_backbone_uv takes working_dir, problem. Launcher knowledge/coding-tools/runtime/launchers/eng-backbone.sh. Recipe VTK phase 2 runtime-linked recipe follows Resolve artifact://environment-spec/eng_backbone_uv as the canonical runtime surface, Run the linked health check for VTK, Stop if the parent-runtime compatibility gate is still REWORK, Execute VTK only inside its declared capability boundary and record the evidence refs. Runtime eng-backbone/uv_venv at .cache/knowledge-envs/eng-backbone; environment ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_backbone_uv; healthcheck commands python scripts/verify_knowledge_runtime.py --environment-ref artifact://environment-spec/eng_backbone_uv; verification refs artifact://verification-report/34165a55-7d67-5bdc-ba36-afa6a6790da5. Runtime gate: Parent packages not promoted for vtk: artifact://knowledge-pack/paraview..
